title: FrostFlite
description: A mod all about Flight, Farming, and Frost.
body:
# FROSTFLITE
This is a mod created with 3 themes in mind, that I feel are underdeveloped in minecraft, Flying, Farming, and Frost (ice). I was given the challenge to make a mod with 3 words that start with f, and I feel I have succeeded with this vanilla-esqe mod.

## Exploration!

Greenhouse Laboratories in the ice cold that contain broccoli and really cold ice.

## Items

There's the farming elytra which uses seed bundles to spread seeds while you fly

There's the Frost Scythe which is both a weapon and a hoe, it's great at both. With a fast attack speed and a 3x3 tilling radius, it's bound to speed up chopping and farming.
